description: Pilot evaluation query set for ALMA-GraphRAG. Gold relevance is rule-based over objective hotel attributes (price/rating/star/travel_time). Replace `gold` with expert annotations to upgrade to a human-judged gold standard.

queries.question: cheap budget hotels in Colombo under 25000 LKR a night
top-rated hotels in Colombo with a rating above 4.5
hotels with quick easy access and low travel time from the city
well rated hotels with good road access and stable ETA
budget friendly hotels that are also easy to reach quickly
highly rated mid-range hotels under 45000 LKR
premium high quality hotels rated 4.6 or higher
affordable well located hotels with fast access under 35000
